name: Kaen the Emberheart
dialogue: Fire burns brightest in a single point. Lava moves with purpose. Embers never waste a spark.
Let’s see if your strikes land where they should.
preBattleLine: Kaen’s fists ignite. The room temperature doubles.
postDefeatDialogue: Kaen extinguishes his fists. A wisp of smoke rises.
Precision. You have it. Hayate guards the storm terrace — he’ll test your courage.
